summary: Comprehensive testing of App Studio V2 Multimodal features. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical UI elements verified - المرفقات tab, AttachmentsPane with upload button, chat-attach-btn paperclip, att-strip thumbnails, brief-mini card with palette swatches, design-brief-card.

issues: Console shows 'Error fetching stats: TypeError: Failed to fetch' - appears to be from ClientDashboard component, does not affect App Studio functionality (pre-existing issue from iteration_29)
Some attachment raw requests return 403 when user_id doesn't match - this is expected security behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Attachment upload correctly handles PNG/JPG/PDF with proper kind detection
PDF text extraction works via pypdf library
Unsupported file types (e.g., .exe) are properly rejected with error messages
Attachments list returns items sorted newest first (created_at descending)
Raw attachment endpoint returns image bytes with correct content-type
Delete attachment works and removes from database
AI Producer chat can call analyze_uploaded_designs tool to extract design_brief
AI Producer chat can call generate_store_assets tool to create store submission package
Build engine respects design_brief palette colors in generated HTML
Frontend AttachmentsPane shows upload button and design-brief-card
Chat composer has paperclip attach button (data-testid='chat-attach-btn')
att-strip thumbnails row visible when attachments exist
brief-mini card in summary panel shows palette swatches
seed_data_creation: Created test projects and attachments during testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Studio V2 Multimodal features fully tested. Key findings: (1) POST /api/app-studio/project/{pid}/upload accepts PNG/JPG/PDF, returns kind='image' or kind='pdf' with pdf_chars, (2) Unsupported files (.exe) rejected with error in errors[], (3) GET /api/app-studio/project/{pid}/attachments lists newest first, (4) GET /api/app-studio/attachment/{aid}/raw returns image bytes with correct content-type, (5) DELETE /api/app-studio/attachment/{aid} deletes attachment, (6) AI Producer chat can call analyze_uploaded_designs to save design_brief on project, (7) AI Producer chat can call generate_store_assets to save store_assets with 5 screenshot_prompts and full_description_ar, (8) Build engine reads design_brief and applies palette colors to generated HTML, (9) Frontend /chat/app-studio shows المرفقات tab when project selected, (10) AttachmentsPane has upload button and shows design-brief-card, (11) Chat composer has paperclip attach button (data-testid='chat-attach-btn'), (12) att-strip thumbnails row visible above composer when attachments exist, (13) brief-mini card in summary panel shows palette swatches when design_brief exists

features_verified.backend_upload_pdf: ✅ POST /api/app-studio/project/{pid}/upload — PDF returns kind='pdf', pdf_chars field present
features_verified.backend_upload_rejects_unsupported: ✅ POST /api/app-studio/project/{pid}/upload — rejects .exe with error in errors[]
features_verified.backend_attachment_raw: ✅ GET /api/app-studio/attachment/{aid}/raw — returns image bytes with correct content-type
features_verified.backend_analyze_uploaded_designs: ✅ AI Producer can call analyze_uploaded_designs tool
features_verified.backend_generate_store_assets: ✅ AI Producer can call generate_store_assets tool
features_verified.backend_build_with_brief: ✅ Build engine generates HTML (design_brief integration verified)
features_verified.backend_store_assets_saved: ✅ store_assets saved on project with full_description_ar and 5 screenshot_prompts
features_verified.frontend_attachments_tab: ✅ المرفقات tab visible in tab bar when project selected
features_verified.frontend_chat_attach_btn: ✅ Chat composer has paperclip attach button (data-testid='chat-attach-btn')
features_verified.frontend_att_strip: ✅ att-strip thumbnails row visible above composer when attachments exist
features_verified.frontend_brief_mini: ✅ brief-mini card in summary panel shows palette swatches
features_verified.frontend_design_brief_card: ✅ design-brief-card shows palette, layout_style, navigation, typography, screens

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI GPT-4o for AI Producer with vision, real code generation)
